strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js, TypeScript, and React matching the primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, Selenium courses, and a custom D test runner
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
No explicit Vitest experience listed (Jest/Vitest framework gap)
Limited recent Kotlin experience; Java work is older (robotic arms era)
response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ years bar with ~14 years of full-stack work and current experience on the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React at Optilyz and re:cinq). The AI-agent requirement is directly addressed by current re:cinq work on MCP code generators and agentic frameworks. Database (MongoDB at Optilyz), cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective deployments), and Git are all evidenced. Gaps are framework-specific: Nest.js and Vitest are not named, and Kotlin/Java exposure is dated. Given the strong fundamentals and AI-agent alignment, these are likely learnable.
